name: List
description: Lists present a vertical run of related records — drivers, notifications, recent vehicles. Each row pairs a primary line with optional supporting text, a leading avatar/icon, and trailing actions.
keyRule: Use a list for simple, scannable records. The moment you need columns, sorting, selection, or pagination, switch to a data table.

variants.name: Two-line
variants.whenToUse: A title plus one supporting detail (most common).

variants.name: Three-line
variants.whenToUse: Title plus two lines of context.

anatomy.name: List container
anatomy.description: holds the items; may be divided or grouped.

anatomy.name: Trailing element
anatomy.description: a meta value, action, or overflow ⋮.

behaviors.name: Activation
behaviors.description: A clickable row navigates or opens detail; show hover and focus so it reads as interactive.

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: For multi-select, use leading checkboxes (and consider whether a data table is the better tool).

behaviors.name: Grouping
behaviors.description: Use subheaders + dividers to group long lists; avoid deep nesting.

props.name: items
props.description: The records rendered as list items, each a row target with primary/secondary text, leading and trailing elements.

props.name: lines
props.description: Single-line, two-line, or three-line variant; two-line is the most common and is the default.

props.name: subheader
props.description: Optional group label rendered above the list (Subheader / divider anatomy).

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base mdc-deprecated-list class.

doThis: Use two-line items for record + context.
Switch to a data table when columns/sorting appear.
dontDoThis: Don't cram tabular data into a list.
Don't hide the only action in a hover-only control without a focus path.
accessibility: Use real list semantics (ul/li or role=list).
Interactive rows are links/buttons with accessible names and visible focus.
Leading checkboxes are labelled by the item text.

related.name: Menu
related.why: Action lists inside a temporary overlay
